Package in.cdac.medinfo.csnotk.csnolib.disb.model

Class GenericDrug

  • java.lang.Object
    • in.cdac.medinfo.csnotk.csnolib.disb.model.GenericDrug
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.io.Serializable
    public class GenericDrug
extends java.lang.Object
implements java.io.Serializable
    Author:
    root GenericDrug contains detail information about Clinical Drug
